summary: All four requirements appear to be implemented. REQ-1: ContactUsPage created with email, phone, location display, accessible via BottomNav and router. REQ-2: Backend stores ContactInfo type with contactInfo state variable and migration support; frontend hooks for get/update are present. REQ-3: ProjectGalleryPage updated with admin-only upload button, progress tracking, and gallery refresh without full reload. REQ-4: ServicesPage updated with all four service categories including titles, descriptions, feature lists, and CTA buttons. One minor gap: the admin-only update function protection in backend cannot be confirmed from the truncated diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: An admin-only update function allows changing contact details
missing_requirements.reason: The backend diff is truncated and does not show the actual updateContactInfo function or its admin-only access guard. The ContactInfo type and state variable are present, but the admin-protected update endpoint cannot be confirmed from available evidence.
